It is classified under the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the wood fern family. The genus Pseudophegopteris is part of this family, and P. aubertii is a specific species within this genus. At the higher taxonomic levels, Pseudophegopteris aubertii can be classified under the division Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae.
